Bloxflip Terms of Service

Last Updated: March 11th 2026

## 1. INTRODUCTION AND DEFINITIONS

BloxFlip.com ("we, us, our, ours, etc.") is the owner and operator of www.bloxflip.com and any affiliated websites and related mobile versions ("Bloxflip"). Bloxflip is an entertainment platform that allows users to play a variety of games ("Games") using two separate virtual currency systems: (i) RoCoins, an internal virtual currency that represents Robux value and may be deposited and withdrawn as Robux, and (ii) FlipCoins, an internal virtual currency that may be purchased with U.S. dollars ("USD") and redeemed as Robux or cryptocurrency, with an integrated experience points system. These Terms of Service are a legal contract that establishes the relationship between you, the user, ("you, your, yours, etc.") and us as it relates to the services we provide to you through Bloxflip ("Services"), including all text, images, graphics, photographs, audio, video, buttons, icons, animations, data, messages, software, and other content, information, or materials on Bloxflip ("Materials"), and any Materials posted to or otherwise shared on Bloxflip by you, primarily through our chatroom ("Content").

Bloxflip is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Roblox Corporation. "Roblox," "Robux," "Limiteds," and all related names, marks, and logos are trademarks of Roblox Corporation, used herein solely for identification purposes. See Section 18 (Roblox Trademark Disclaimer) for full details.

As used in these Terms of Service:

"RoCoins" means the virtual currency on Bloxflip that represents Robux value. RoCoins are obtained by depositing Robux and may be withdrawn as Robux. RoCoins have no cash value and are for entertainment purposes only.

"FlipCoins" means the virtual currency on Bloxflip that may be purchased with USD and used to play Games. FlipCoins may be redeemed as Robux or cryptocurrency, subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein. FlipCoins have no independent cash value and are for entertainment purposes only.

"XP" or "Experience Points" means digital goods earned by users through gameplay and other activities on Bloxflip, or purchased directly from Bloxflip at independently established prices, which advance the user's Level and unlock additional features and benefits. XP only increases and is never lost or reduced through gameplay

"Level" or "Levels" means the tiers of membership determined by a user's total XP. Because XP only increases, Levels can never decrease.

"Games" means the chance-based entertainment games offered on Bloxflip from time to time.

"Robux" means the virtual in-game currency used by players of the Roblox platform.

"Limiteds" means the limited-edition virtual items available on the Roblox platform.

"Roblox" means the online platform operated by Roblox Corporation, which is an independent third party with no affiliation to Bloxflip.

## 2. ACCEPTANCE

By accessing Bloxflip or using the Services, you accept and agree to our website policies, including these Terms of Service, and you certify to us that (i) you are eighteen (18) years of age or older, and are at least the age of majority in your jurisdiction, (ii) you are not a resident of the state of Washington, (iii) you have the legal capacity to enter into and agree to these Terms of Service, (iv) you are using the Services freely, voluntarily, willingly, and for your own personal enjoyment, and (v) you will only provide accurate and complete information to us and promptly update this information as necessary to maintain its accuracy and completeness.

## 3. RIGHT TO REVISE

We reserve the right to revise these Terms of Service at any time. You agree that we have this unilateral right, and that all modifications or changes are in force and enforceable immediately upon posting. The updated version supersedes any prior versions immediately upon posting, and the prior version is of no continuing legal effect unless the revised version specifically refers to the prior version and keeps the prior version or portions thereof in effect. We agree that if we change anything in these Terms of Service, we will change the "Last Updated" date at the top of these Terms of Service. You agree to re-visit this page on a frequent basis, and to use the "Refresh" button on your browser when doing so. You agree to note the date above. If the "Last Updated" date remains unchanged from the last time you reviewed these Terms of Service, then you may presume that nothing in these Terms of Service has changed since the last time you visited. If the "Last Updated" date has changed, then you must review the updated Terms of Service in their entirety. You must agree to any updated Terms of Service or immediately cease use of Bloxflip. If you fail to review these Terms of Service as required to determine if any changes have been made, you assume all responsibility for such omission, and you agree that such failure amounts to your affirmative waiver of your right to review the updated terms. We are not responsible for your neglect of your legal rights.

## 4. NOT A GAMBLING SERVICE

We are not a gambling service, we do not take or place illegal bets, and we do not recommend or encourage illegal gambling. Instead, we offer entertaining online Games that fall outside the prohibitions imposed by state and federal gambling laws. Bloxflip operates two separate virtual currency systems, each of which independently removes an essential element of gambling:

(A) RoCoins (Virtual-to-Virtual Model). RoCoins are an internal virtual currency with no real-world cash value. Users deposit Robux (a virtual currency with no cash value under the Roblox Terms of Use) to receive RoCoins, play Games using RoCoins, and may withdraw their RoCoins as Robux. Because Robux and RoCoins are virtual currencies with no real-world cash value under the Roblox Terms of Use, nothing of real-world value is at stake or can be won at any point in this process. The "prize" element required for gambling is therefore absent — there is no prize of real-world value that a user can win. RoCoins represent virtual-to-virtual transactions only. You will not transfer, attempt to transfer, or offer to transfer RoCoins won on Bloxflip for cash, cash equivalent, or any thing of value on any third-party platform.

(B) FlipCoins (XP Loss-Back Model). FlipCoins are an internal virtual currency that may be purchased with USD and used to play Games. Each time a user loses FlipCoins in a Game, the user receives XP (Experience Points) with a fair market value ("FMV") equal to the FMV of the FlipCoins lost, calculated using the independently established purchase prices of each digital good (currently four hundred (400) XP for one dollar ($1.00 USD) and five hundred (500) FlipCoins for one dollar ($1.00 USD)). For example, losing 100 FlipCoins (FMV of $0.20) results in 80 XP (FMV of $0.20). Because the user always receives XP — a digital good with independently established FMV — equal in value to the FlipCoins lost, the user never suffers a net loss of value. Because the user always receives goods with a total FMV equal to or greater than the value of the FlipCoins wagered, the "consideration" element required for gambling is absent.

Gambling, whether in-person or online, is not legal in all areas. If you seek information regarding any illegal activity, you must leave Bloxflip immediately and shall not attempt to use the Services. You agree not to use the Services if doing so would violate the laws of your state, province, or country. Please consult with your local authorities or legal advisors before participating in online gaming of any kind. It is your sole and absolute responsibility to comply with all applicable laws, and you assume all risk in using the Services. Nothing on Bloxflip shall be construed as legal advice on any activity relating to gambling. You assume all risk and responsibility for your use of the Services. We bear no responsibility for your use of the Services in connection with illegal gambling activities, and we do not condone illegal gambling. You understand and agree that the Services are for entertainment purposes only. We make no guarantee that the Services are legal in your jurisdiction.

## 5. ACCOUNTS

### 5.1 Registration

All users may create a single account on Bloxflip by signing in using their Roblox log-in credentials, provided you meet the requirements set forth herein and otherwise abide by these Terms of Service. To purchase FlipCoins or make other USD-denominated purchases on Bloxflip, you must also provide a valid payment method. To redeem FlipCoins as cryptocurrency, we may require you to provide certain age and/or identity verification documentation, including a copy of a government-issued identification card and a valid cryptocurrency wallet address, and to undergo and pass our age and/or identity verification procedures. Identity verification is required after five hundred dollars ($500 USD) in cumulative redemptions. Acceptance of registration is subject to our sole discretion.

### 5.2 Accuracy

If you provide any false, misleading, inaccurate, incomplete, not current, or otherwise incorrect information to us, or if you fail to promptly update such information to maintain its accuracy and completeness, or if we or any of our authorized agents have reasonable grounds to suspect that a violation of this provision has occurred, we have the right to suspend or terminate your account and refuse any and all current or future use of Bloxflip, as well as subjecting you to criminal and civil liability. While we may require you to provide additional information as necessary to verify the accuracy of your identity and the information you provide to us, you understand and agree that we do not sponsor or endorse any user or any Materials posted by our users.

### 5.3 No Account Sharing

You will not use, attempt to access, or ask for the login credentials for any third party's account at any time. You will not allow any third party to access or use your account at any time, nor provide any third party with your login credentials. We will not be liable for any loss that we may incur as a result of any third party that uses your password or otherwise accesses your account, either with or without your knowledge. You will be liable for losses incurred by us or any third party due to release of account credentials to unauthorized persons.

### 5.4 Termination by You

You may delete your account by clicking "Delete Account" in your account settings. When you delete your account, you will forfeit all rights and interests in your account, including any RoCoins, FlipCoins, and XP remaining in your account. You should withdraw any RoCoins or redeem any FlipCoins in your account before deletion. You will not assign, transfer, sell, or share your membership to Bloxflip. If you do, both you and the unauthorized user are jointly and severally liable for any fees that will be due.

### 5.5 Termination by Us

We may suspend or delete your account or any licenses herein at any time, for any reason, in our sole discretion. We have the right to terminate your membership at any time, and you will be responsible for all charges to your account at the time of termination. We are not responsible for preserving terminated account information which may be permanently deleted in our discretion. If we suspend or terminate your account for cause (including a breach of these Terms of Service), you forfeit all rights and interests in your account, including any RoCoins, FlipCoins, or XP remaining in your account. If we suspend or terminate your account for any other reason, we may, in our sole discretion, permit you to withdraw any RoCoins or redeem any FlipCoins remaining in your account.

## 6. GRANT OF RIGHTS

### 6.1 Materials

You understand that all we are selling you is access to Bloxflip and use of the Services as we provide them from time to time. You need to provide your own access to the Internet, hardware, and software, and you are solely responsible for any fees that you incur to access Bloxflip or use the Services. All users may access certain public areas of Bloxflip and use the Services and the Materials therein, free of charge. We grant all users a limited, nonexclusive, revocable, and nontransferable personal license to access and use only those Materials provided on free areas of Bloxflip for private, non-commercial purposes on a single computer or mobile device. This free license does not include a license to access or use paid areas of Bloxflip or the Materials therein. We also grant you a limited, nonexclusive, revocable, and nontransferable personal license to access Bloxflip and use the Services and the Materials therein, as limited by your purchase of certain paid features and upgrades. This paid license is for private, non-commercial purposes on a single computer or mobile device. We reserve the right to limit the amount of Materials viewed or Services available to you. Your license to access Bloxflip and use the Services and the Materials is not a transfer of title. You will not copy or redistribute any Materials, and you will prevent others from unauthorized access, use of, or copying of the Materials.

### 6.2 Content

We may permit you to submit Content to Bloxflip, such as your username, avatar image, and chatroom correspondence. Except for personally identifiable information covered under our Privacy Policy, we will consider Content submitted to Bloxflip non-confidential and nonproprietary. We will have no obligation regarding Content, and we do not guarantee any confidentiality for any Content. You are solely responsible for the Content and the consequences of posting the Content to Bloxflip.

You retain all ownership rights in the Content. However, you grant us a worldwide, perpetual, nonexclusive, royalty-free, sublicensable, and transferable license to use, reproduce, distribute, prepare derivative works of, display, and perform the Content for our business (and the business of our successors), including for promoting and redistributing any part of Bloxflip (and derivative works of it) in any media formats and through any media channels for the purposes set forth in these Terms of Service. This license shall include the right to copy and transfer the Content to any affiliate or related or partner sites of ours, and to post the Content on different pages of Bloxflip at our sole discretion. We may freely use this Content for any purpose.

Further, you grant each user of Bloxflip a worldwide, nonexclusive, royalty-free license to access, use, reproduce, display, and perform the Content through Bloxflip, as permitted through Bloxflip and under these Terms of Service, and as limited by that user's subscriptions or additional purchases.

## 7. ACCEPTABLE USE POLICY

### 7.1 Prohibited Uses for All Users

You agree that you will only use Bloxflip, the Services, and the Materials for purposes expressly permitted and contemplated by these Terms of Service. You may not use Bloxflip, the Services, or the Materials for any other purposes without our express prior written consent. Without our express prior written authorization, you will not:

(a) use the Services for any purpose other than as offered by us, including using the Services in any way that is prohibited by these Terms of Service or that is violative of any applicable law, regulation, or treaty of any applicable governmental body, including:

    (i) laws prohibiting illegal gambling;

    (ii) intellectual property right laws protecting patents, copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets, and any other intellectual property right, including making, obtaining, distributing, or otherwise accessing illegal copies of copyrighted, trademarked, or patented content, deleting intellectual property right indications and notices, or otherwise manipulating identifiers in order to disguise the origin of Content you post, share, or upload;

    (iii) laws against obscene, lewd, defamatory, or libelous speech; and

    (iv) laws protecting confidentiality, privacy rights, publicity rights, or data protection.

(b) fail to comply with orders, judgments, or mandates from courts of competent jurisdiction.

(c) fail to abide by our chat rules, including (i) advertising other websites, (ii) promoting your affiliate code, and (iii) discussing bans and mutes.

(d) link to Bloxflip on any third-party website in any way that is illegal, unfair, or damages or takes advantage of our reputation, including any link which establishes or suggests a form of association, approval, or endorsement by us where none exists.

(e) post, upload, or share Content that is harmful, inaccurate, threatening, abusive, vulgar, violent, indecent, harassing, hateful, menacing, scandalous, inflammatory, blasphemous, racially or ethnically offensive, likely to cause annoyance, intimidation, alarm, embarrassment, distress, discomfort, or inconvenience, or that is otherwise objectionable or inappropriate.

(f) post, upload, or share Content that depicts, advertises, promotes, encourages, facilitates, or solicits (real, simulated, or implied) sexually explicit material.

(g) post, upload, or share Content that promotes or facilitates prostitution or which contributes to sex trafficking activity.

(h) post, upload, or share Content with the intent to extort money or other benefit from a third party in exchange for removal of the Content.

(i) post, upload, or share any employment ads or Content which violates anti-discrimination laws.

(j) post, upload, share, or collect the telephone numbers, street addresses, last names, email addresses, URLs, geographic location, or any other personal information about users or third parties without their consent, or, except as expressly authorized in these Terms of Service, use Materials, third-party content, or other Content on the Services for any commercial use.

(k) impersonate another individual or entity, whether actual or fictitious; falsely claim an affiliation with any individual or entity; access the accounts of others without permission; misrepresent the source, identity, or content of information transmitted via the Services; or perform any other similar fraudulent activity.

(l) use slang, acronyms, abbreviations, emojis, GIFs, or other media to communicate any activity that violates these Terms of Service.

(m) engage in antisocial, disruptive, or destructive behavior, including "bombing," "flaming," "spamming," "flooding," "trolling," and "griefing" as those terms are commonly understood and used on the Internet, or engage in any other behavior that serves no purpose other than to harass, annoy, or offend users.

(n) engage in platform manipulation, including utilizing bots or other fraudulent means to artificially drive traffic to or inauthentically generate engagements with your account, the Content, or links to third party websites.

(o) circumvent, disable, damage, or otherwise interfere with the operations of Bloxflip, any user's enjoyment of Bloxflip, or our security-related features or features that prevent, limit, or restrict the use or copying of any Materials or Content, or features that enforce limitations on the use of Bloxflip or the Content on it, by any means, including posting, linking to, uploading, or otherwise disseminating viruses, adware, spyware, malware, logic bombs, Trojan horses, worms, harmful components, corrupted data, or other malicious code, file, or program designed to interrupt, destroy, limit, or monitor the functionality of any computer software or hardware or any telecommunications equipment.

(p) reverse engineer, decompile, disassemble, or otherwise discover the source code of Bloxflip or any part of it, except and only if that activity is expressly permitted by applicable law despite this limitation.

(q) access or use any automated process (such as a robot, spider, scraper, or similar) to access Bloxflip in violation of our robot exclusion headers or to scrape all or a substantial part of the Materials (other than in connection with bona fide search engine indexing or as we may otherwise expressly permit).

(r) modify, adapt, translate, or create derivative works based on the Services or any part of them, except and only if applicable law expressly permits that activity despite this limitation.

(s) commercially exploit or make available the Services or the Materials therein to third parties including any action to "frame" or "mirror" Bloxflip.

(t) take any action that imposes or may impose (in our sole discretion) an unreasonable or disproportionately large load on our technology infrastructure or otherwise make excessive demands on it.

(u) attempt to do any of the acts described in this section or assist or permit any person in engaging in any of the acts described in this section.

Engaging in any Prohibited Use will be considered a breach of these Terms of Service and may result in immediate suspension or termination of the user's account and access to Bloxflip or the platform without notice, including forfeiture of any RoCoins, FlipCoins, and XP, in our sole discretion. We may pursue any legal remedies or other appropriate actions against you if you engage in any of the above Prohibited Uses or any unauthorized use of the Services, including civil, criminal, or injunctive relief, forfeiture of earnings, and cancellation of your account. Any unauthorized use of the Services or our computer systems violates these Terms of Service and certain international, foreign, and domestic laws.

### 7.2 Reporting Violative Materials or Activities

If you are aware of any Materials on Bloxflip or any user engaging in activities that violate these Terms of Service, please email support[at]bloxflip[dot]com and provide as much detail as possible, including a description of the objectionable Materials or the location where we may find them, the username of the individual engaging in suspicious activities, the date and time of identification, the reason we should remove the objectionable Materials or investigate the activities, and a statement certifying the accuracy of the information you provided to us.

### 7.3 Law Enforcement

We will fully cooperate with law enforcement authorities or orders from courts of competent jurisdiction, requesting or directing us to disclose the identity or location of any user in breach of these Terms of Service, in accordance with our privacy policies, law enforcement policies, and applicable law or regulation. If your activity results in Bloxflip receiving a subpoena, discovery request, production order, search warrant, or court order that causes Bloxflip to incur expenses, court costs, or legal fees for compliance, you agree to reimburse us for any such expenses, costs or legal fees upon our request.

## 8. BILLING AND PAYMENTS

### 8.1 RoCoins

You understand and agree that RoCoins have no cash value and are for entertainment purposes only. RoCoins represent virtual-to-virtual transactions and may not be exchanged for USD or any other real-world currency. Unused RoCoins are not eligible for any full or partial refunds. RoCoins may be deleted from inactive or terminated accounts. We may offer you the opportunity to obtain differing amounts of RoCoins through deposits of Robux. The conversion rate between Robux and RoCoins is displayed on Bloxflip, and you may only obtain RoCoins at the currently displayed rate. We reserve the right to change the conversion rate at our discretion. All previous offers or discounts are unavailable once removed from Bloxflip. You will not transfer, attempt to transfer, or offer to transfer the RoCoins won on Bloxflip for cash, cash equivalent, or any thing of value on any third-party platform.

You agree to pay any and all fees or account charges related to any fees, charges, purchases, or upgrades associated with your account, immediately when due in accordance with our stated billing policy, or that of our third-party billing agent. You acknowledge that the charge on your banking statement for our Services may display our company name, one of our brand names, or our third-party billing agent's name. You understand and agree that you are responsible for any and all fees or penalties that are associated with your account. Your account will be deemed past due if it is not paid in full by the payment due date. Your card issuer agreement may contain additional terms with respect to your rights and liabilities as a card holder. You agree to pay any and all amounts due immediately upon cancellation or termination of your account.

### 8.2 FlipCoins

FlipCoins are a virtual currency on Bloxflip that may be purchased with USD and used to play Games. FlipCoins are sold at a rate of one thousand (1,000) FlipCoins for two dollars ($2.00 USD). We may offer differing amounts of FlipCoins at different prices. The price of FlipCoins is displayed on Bloxflip, and you may only purchase FlipCoins for the currently displayed price. FlipCoins are for entertainment purposes only. Unused FlipCoins are not eligible for any full or partial refunds. FlipCoins may be deleted from inactive or terminated accounts. We reserve the right to charge additional fees for access to Bloxflip or any other feature or service of Bloxflip, and to change our fee structure at our discretion. All previous offers or discounts are unavailable once removed from Bloxflip.

RoCoins and FlipCoins are completely separate currency systems. RoCoins may not be converted to FlipCoins, and FlipCoins may not be converted to RoCoins. Each currency may only be used, deposited, withdrawn, and redeemed in accordance with the specific terms applicable to that currency as set forth in these Terms of Service. When playing Games using FlipCoins, XP is awarded in accordance with Section 8.3 (XP and Levels) below.

### 8.3 XP (Experience Points) and Levels

XP is used to calculate your Level and the features and benefits available to you on Bloxflip and our third-party service providers, such as our Discord chatroom. XP is automatically awarded to your account each time you play a Game using FlipCoins. The specific amount of XP to be awarded may vary from Game to Game but is displayed at the time of play. When a user loses FlipCoins in a Game, the user receives XP with an FMV equal to the FMV of the FlipCoins lost, calculated using the independently established purchase prices of each digital good (e.g., losing 100 FlipCoins at $0.002/FlipCoin results in 80 XP at $0.0025/XP, both having an FMV of $0.20). XP may also be purchased directly from Bloxflip at a rate of four hundred (400) XP for one dollar ($1.00 USD). We may offer differing amounts of XP at different prices. You may only purchase XP at the currently displayed price. All previous offers or discounts are unavailable once removed from Bloxflip. XP only increases and is never lost or reduced through gameplay. We reserve the right to remove or revoke XP from your account if you violate these Terms of Service or if your purchase results in a chargeback.

Levels. Your Level is determined by your total XP. Because XP only increases through gameplay and purchases, your Level can never decrease. The number of total XP needed to attain any Level and the features and benefits associated with each Level is displayed on Bloxflip. We reserve the right to modify the number of total XP needed to attain any Level and to add, remove, or change the features and benefits associated with each Level from time to time in our sole discretion. Any material changes to Level benefits will apply prospectively and will not reduce the Level or XP balance of any existing user.

Level Benefits. Levels unlock increasingly advantageous features on Bloxflip as well as off-site benefits including (i) discounts such as increased cashback incentives and deposit bonuses, (ii) reputational benefits such as ranking higher on the community leaderboard and earning exclusive badges and emblems, (iii) enhanced digital services, including additional avatar options, highlighted or emphasized chat content, chatroom roles and moderator privileges, and (iv) free physical goods such as exclusive stickers, clothing, and other branded merchandise. We reserve the right to add, remove, or change the benefits associated with any Level at any time, for any reason, without prior notice to you.

### 8.4 Free RoCoins

From time to time, free RoCoins may be offered to users that engage in certain activities, such as participating in our affiliate program, completing surveys, mining crypto, using a coupon code, or participating in a Rain giveaway. All requirements for obtaining free RoCoins are prominently displayed on Bloxflip. We reserve the right to add, remove, or change the methods and requirements necessary to obtain free RoCoins at any time, for any reason, without prior notice to you. All previous methods of obtaining free RoCoins are unavailable once removed from Bloxflip.

### 8.5 Tipping

You may send RoCoins to another user by typing ".tip <USERNAME> <AMOUNT>" in the chat with the other user's username in the place of "<USERNAME>", and with the amount of RoCoins you would like to give away to that other user in the place of "<AMOUNT>". We reserve the right to limit the amount of RoCoins that may be tipped at any given time, the amount of tips that may be made within a certain time frame, or to place any other limitation on tipping as we may deem appropriate or necessary in our sole discretion, at any time, for any reason, without notice to you. If you type this in the chatroom, you will transfer the entered amount of RoCoins to the entered user. Tipping is available for RoCoins only. FlipCoins may not be tipped.

We reserve the right to rescind any RoCoins transferred to your account through the tipping feature by a user who obtained those RoCoins through fraud, conduct violations, technical errors, or hacking.

### 8.6 Rain

From time to time, we may allow you to distribute RoCoins to other users of Bloxflip, if you operate an account that (i) is at least twenty-four (24) hours old, (ii) has wagered at least fifty (50) RoCoins, (iii) has made at least one (1) deposit in the last twelve (12) hours, and (iv) has more than five hundred (500) RoCoins. To distribute RoCoins to other users of Bloxflip, type ".rain <AMOUNT>" in the chatroom, with the amount of RoCoins you would like to give away in the place of "<AMOUNT>". If you type this in the chatroom, you will forfeit that amount of RoCoins. Rain is available for RoCoins only. FlipCoins may not be distributed via Rain.

If a Rain event is active, you may join the Rain event for a chance to obtain free RoCoins by clicking the "JOIN" button prominently displayed on Bloxflip and meeting all other requirements. To transfer a gifted Rain balance to your Roblox account, you must have wagered at least four (4) times the amount of RoCoins attempting to be transferred.

We reserve the right to add, remove, or change the methods and requirements necessary to participate in a Rain event at any time, for any reason, without prior notice to you. All previous methods and requirements of Rain events are unavailable and void once removed from Bloxflip.

We reserve the right to rescind any RoCoins transferred to your account through the Rain feature by a user who obtained those RoCoins through fraud, conduct violations, technical errors, or hacking.

### 8.7 Depositing RoCoins

To deposit Robux and receive RoCoins on Bloxflip, you initiate a deposit request on Bloxflip for a specified Robux amount. Bloxflip facilitates a peer-to-peer ("P2P") gamepass transaction: you purchase a gamepass through Bloxflip's platform for the specified Robux amount, and the Robux are transferred peer-to-peer to another user (who is withdrawing). Upon successful completion of the gamepass purchase, the corresponding amount of RoCoins is credited to your Bloxflip account at the then-current conversion rate. To request a deposit, you must click on the deposit button prominently displayed on Bloxflip, enter an amount of at least ten (10) Robux, and complete the transaction. Successful deposits will be indicated by a notification on your screen.

You understand and agree that deposits rely on the availability of a matching withdrawal request from another user and that we may not be able to immediately honor a request to deposit Robux. We may postpone requests to deposit Robux for so long as reasonably necessary. During any postponement, you may cancel or change your request to deposit Robux. You understand and agree that Roblox may charge marketplace fees on gamepass transactions and that such fees are your responsibility. You further understand and agree that certain requirements or limitations may be imposed by Roblox on gamepass transactions, and that we have no control over such third-party requirements.

We reserve the right to add, remove, or change the methods and requirements necessary to deposit Robux and receive RoCoins at any time, for any reason, without prior notice to you. All previous methods of depositing Robux are unavailable once removed from Bloxflip.

Users may not deposit Limiteds on Bloxflip.

### 8.8 Purchasing FlipCoins

If you provide valid and current payment information, you may purchase FlipCoins at the rate of one thousand (1,000) FlipCoins for two dollars ($2.00 USD), or at such other rates as may be displayed on Bloxflip from time to time. We may offer you the opportunity to purchase differing amounts of FlipCoins for differing prices. The price of FlipCoins is displayed on Bloxflip, and you may only purchase FlipCoins for the currently displayed price. Accepted payment methods may include credit card (Visa, Mastercard), debit card, cryptocurrency, and such other payment methods as we may offer from time to time. The available payment methods are prominently displayed on Bloxflip.

You agree to pay all fees or account charges related to any fees, taxes, charges, purchases, or upgraded features associated with your account, immediately when due in accordance with our stated billing policy, or that of our third-party billing agent. You acknowledge that the charge on your banking statement may display our company name, one of our brand names, or our third-party billing agent's name. You understand and agree that you are responsible for all fees or penalties that are associated with your account. Your account will be deemed past due if it is not paid in full by the payment due date. Your card issuer agreement may contain additional terms with respect to your rights and liabilities as a card holder. You agree to pay all amounts due immediately upon cancellation or termination of your account.

### 8.9 Limiteds

You may choose to withdraw Limiteds from Bloxflip using either your RoCoins or your FlipCoins. You understand and agree that Limiteds have no cash value and are for entertainment purposes only. The available Limiteds and the exchange rate for such Limiteds is prominently displayed on Bloxflip. We reserve the right to change the available Limiteds and the exchange rate for such Limiteds at any time, for any reason, without notice to you. All previous offers are unavailable once removed from Bloxflip. Withdrawn Limiteds are not eligible for any full or partial refunds. Limiteds may be deleted from inactive or terminated accounts. You will not transfer, attempt to transfer, or offer to transfer Limiteds obtained through Bloxflip for cash, cash equivalent, or any thing of value on any third-party platform.

### 8.10 Withdrawing RoCoins

RoCoins may only be withdrawn as Robux. RoCoins may not be withdrawn as USD or any other real-world currency. To withdraw RoCoins as Robux, you must have a Roblox experience (place/game) in which you can create a gamepass. You create a gamepass in your Roblox experience at the specified Robux amount, then submit a withdrawal request on Bloxflip. Bloxflip facilitates a peer-to-peer ("P2P") gamepass transaction: a depositing user purchases your gamepass through Bloxflip's platform, and the Robux are transferred peer-to-peer to your Roblox account. To request a withdrawal, you must click the withdrawal button prominently displayed on Bloxflip, select an amount of at least ten (10) RoCoins to be transferred, and follow the instructions to create and link your gamepass. The RoCoin-to-Robux conversion rate is variable and is displayed at the currently displayed rate on the withdrawal modal. Successful withdrawals will be indicated by a notification on your screen.

You understand and agree that withdrawals rely on the availability of a matching deposit request from another user and that we may not be able to immediately honor a request to withdraw RoCoins. We may postpone requests to withdraw RoCoins for so long as reasonably necessary. During any postponement, you may cancel or change your request. We reserve the right to limit the number of active withdrawal requests any user may make at any given time. You understand and agree that Roblox may charge marketplace fees on gamepass transactions and that such fees are your responsibility.

You are responsible for providing accurate Roblox account information and a valid gamepass for your withdrawal. You must own or control the Roblox account and experience associated with your withdrawal, and you agree to provide us with such information as we may request to confirm your ownership or control. We may set off any liability, damages, costs, or expenses that we incur arising from or relating to your breach of these Terms of Service against any RoCoins that we owe to you under these Terms of Service. We may prohibit you from withdrawing RoCoins from your account for any reason, at any time, without advance warning or notice, including retroactively. The most common reasons for withdrawal prohibitions include fraud, conduct violations, technical errors, and hacking.

### 8.11 Redeeming FlipCoins

FlipCoins may be redeemed as Robux or as cryptocurrency. There is no minimum redemption amount for FlipCoins; however, you are responsible for any network, gas, processing, or marketplace fees associated with your redemption, including fees charged by Roblox, third-party payment processors, or the blockchain.

To redeem FlipCoins as Robux, you must have a Roblox experience (place/game) in which you can create a gamepass. You create a gamepass in your Roblox experience at the specified Robux amount, then submit a redemption request on Bloxflip. Bloxflip facilitates a peer-to-peer ("P2P") gamepass transaction: a depositing user purchases your gamepass through Bloxflip's platform, and the Robux are transferred peer-to-peer to your Roblox account. The FlipCoin-to-Robux conversion rate is variable and is displayed at the currently displayed rate on the redemption modal. You understand and agree that Roblox may charge marketplace fees on gamepass transactions and that such fees are your responsibility.

To redeem FlipCoins as cryptocurrency, you must provide a valid cryptocurrency wallet address and complete any applicable identity verification requirements. Identity verification is required after five hundred dollars ($500 USD) in cumulative redemptions. We may require you to provide a copy of a government-issued identification card and to undergo and pass our identity verification procedures before processing your cryptocurrency redemption. See Section 8.13 (Cryptocurrency) for additional terms and disclaimers applicable to cryptocurrency transactions.

You must wager at least one time (1x) the amount of your deposit before you may redeem FlipCoins, for anti-money-laundering purposes.

You understand and agree that we may not be able to immediately honor a request to redeem FlipCoins, and that we may postpone requests to redeem FlipCoins for so long as reasonably necessary. We reserve the right to limit the number or amount of active redemptions any user may make at any given time. We may prohibit you from redeeming FlipCoins from your account for any reason, at any time, without advance warning or notice, including retroactively. The most common reasons for redemption prohibitions include fraud, conduct violations, technical errors, and hacking.

### 8.12 Taxes

You shall be responsible for payment of all applicable taxes, and we will not be responsible for any federal income tax withholding, unemployment contribution, workers compensation, Medicare / Medicaid, or any employment-related benefits. If requested, you will provide us with a Social Security Number or Taxpayer Identification Number, or any other required information, so that an IRS form 1099 may be issued where required by law. Failure to provide such information to us may result in termination of your account.

### 8.13 Cryptocurrency

We may permit you to pay for the Services using one or more cryptocurrencies, such as Bitcoin. We may also permit you to redeem FlipCoins as cryptocurrency. Acceptance of such payment or redemption method is in our sole discretion and may be of limited duration. Any payment or transfer in cryptocurrency is irreversible. Refunds of cryptocurrency payments are at our sole discretion, and, if allowed, may take the form of cryptocurrency transfer, or corresponding cash value of the requested refund, at our option. Additional administrative fees may apply to cryptocurrency transactions. By paying for the Services in cryptocurrency, or by redeeming FlipCoins as cryptocurrency, you acknowledge that the value of cryptocurrencies is highly volatile and that there is a substantial risk of loss associated with using cryptocurrencies. You consent to the risk that the value of cryptocurrencies may be influenced by activity outside Bloxflip's control, including fluctuating public interest in cryptocurrencies, potential regulation of cryptocurrencies, and risks associated with hardware, software, or Internet connection issues, malicious software, unauthorized access, or other communication failures, disruptions, errors, distortions, and delays. Bloxflip does not represent, guarantee, or warrant the accuracy or fairness of the value of any cryptocurrency. You are solely responsible for making your own independent appraisal and investigations into the value of any purchase or redemption on the Services.

We utilize various third-party payment processors and gateways, and we reserve the right to contract with additional third-party payment processors and gateways in our sole discretion to process any and all payments associated with Bloxflip. Such third parties may impose additional terms and conditions governing payment processing. You are responsible for abiding by such terms. We further disclaim any liability associated with your violation of such terms.

You are responsible for any credit card charge backs, dishonored checks, and any related fees that Bloxflip incurs with respect to your account, along with any additional fees or penalties imposed by our third-party billing agent.

### 8.18 Refunds

You understand and agree that it is our standard policy that all purchases are final and nonrefundable. We reserve the right to address all refund requests in our sole discretion. In no instance will a refund be provided where the user initiates a charge back.

### 8.19 Billing Errors

If you believe that you have been erroneously billed for activity associated with your account, please notify our third-party billing agent immediately of such error. If you do not do so within thirty (30) days after such billing error first appears on any account statement, the fee in question will be deemed acceptable by you for all purposes, including resolution of inquiries made by or on behalf of your banking institution. You release us from all liabilities and claims of loss resulting from any error or discrepancy that is not reported within thirty (30) days of the bill being rendered to you. These terms shall supplement and be in addition to any terms required by third party billing entities we engage to provide billing services. ### 8.20 Fraudulent Use of Credit Cards

We take credit card fraud very seriously. Discovery that you have used a stolen or fraudulent credit card will result in the notification of the appropriate law enforcement agencies and termination of your account.

### 8.21 Anti-Money Laundering

We prohibit and seek to prevent money laundering and the funding of criminal activities. We train our employees to monitor for suspicious transactions on Bloxflip and to review transactions that meet certain thresholds or criteria. We may provide any evidence of such activities by our users (and your personally identifiable information as detailed in our Privacy Policy) to financial regulators or law enforcement as deemed necessary by us.

We may prevent you from creating an account, suspend or terminate your account, or request additional information from you if (1) you provide fraudulent account or payment information, such as impersonating a third party, (2) one or more of your transactions is flagged by our monitoring systems, or (3) you are on EU, UN, U.S. (OFAC), or similar sanctions or terrorism watch lists. If you refuse or fail to provide any requested information in a timely manner, we will terminate your account.

You must wager at least one time (1x) the total amount deposited before redeeming any FlipCoins.

### 8.22 Account Balances

You understand and agree that (i) your account balance (including any RoCoins, FlipCoins, unwithdrawn Limiteds, and XP on your account) may not be returned or paid to you if Bloxflip becomes insolvent, (ii) Bloxflip does not pay interest on account balances, and (iii) account balances and transactions are only reported to you through Bloxflip, and we are under no obligation to issue any other report regarding your account balance or transactions.

## 9. RULES OF THE GAMES

From time to time, we may offer certain Games on Bloxflip. Games may be played using either RoCoins or FlipCoins, as indicated on each Game's page. We reserve the right to add, remove, or change the Games and the rules of the Games at any time, for any reason, without prior notice to you. The current rules of each Game are prominently displayed on Bloxflip. All previous Games and associated rules are unavailable once removed from Bloxflip.

When playing a Game using RoCoins, winnings and losses are denominated in RoCoins. When playing a Game using FlipCoins, winnings and losses are denominated in FlipCoins, and XP is awarded in accordance with Section 8.3 (XP and Levels) above. RoCoins and FlipCoins may not be mixed within a single Game.

Any changes to our Affiliate commission rate will only be applied to new users sent to us after the publication of the change. We will only issue earned commissions, less any fees otherwise associated with your account, if you have met the minimum payout threshold. We may deduct from your commissions an amount equal to any commission resulting in a refund or chargeback related to a purchase through your Link or any commission resulting from fraud, other illegal activity, technical error, or as required by law. No commissions will be paid on transactions that are in violation of this section or any other provision of these Terms of Service. ### 16.1 Trademarks

Other manufacturers' product and service names referenced herein may be trademarks and service marks of their respective companies and are the exclusive property of such respective owners, and may not be used publicly without the express written consent of the owners or holders of such trademarks and service marks. All of the marks, logos, domains, and trademarks that you find on Bloxflip may not be used publicly except with express written permission from us, and may not be used in any manner that is likely to cause confusion among consumers, or in any manner that disparages or discredits Bloxflip.

### 16.2 Copyrights

Except for Materials posted by our users, the Materials are our proprietary information and valuable intellectual property. We retain all right, title, and interest in such Materials. Bloxflip, the Materials, and our software are protected by copyright law. The Materials may not be copied, downloaded, distributed, republished, modified, uploaded, posted, or transmitted in any way without our prior written consent. You may not remove or alter, or cause to be removed or altered, any copyright, trademark, trade name, service mark, or any other proprietary notice or legend appearing on any of the Materials. Modification or use of the Materials except as expressly provided in these Terms of Service violates our intellectual property rights.

## 17. GENERAL

### 17.1 Entire Agreement

These Terms of Service and any other legal notice or agreement published by us on Bloxflip, forms the entire agreement between you and us concerning your use of Bloxflip. It supersedes all prior terms, understandings, or agreements between you and us regarding use of Bloxflip. A printed version of these Terms of Service and of any notice given in electronic form will be admissible in any proceedings based on or relating to these terms. Such version of these Terms of Service shall be utilized to the same evidentiary extent, and subject to the same conditions as other business documents and records originally generated and maintained in printed form.

### 17.2 Policies of Our Service Providers

You understand and agree that we may use certain third-party service providers to offer the Services to you. You understand and agree that you must agree to and abide by any user terms, privacy policy, or other policy that such third party requires you to agree to in order to use their services. In the event of a conflict between those policies and our policies, the terms of our policies shall govern.

### 17.3 Assignment and Delegation

We may assign any rights or delegate any performance under these Terms of Service without notice to you. You will not assign, delegate, or sublicense any of your rights or duties without our advance written consent. Any attempted assignment or delegation in violation of this provision will be void.

### 17.4 Severability

If any provision of these Terms of Service is determined to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force, if the essential terms for each party remain valid, binding, and enforceable.

### 17.5 Cumulative Remedies

All rights and remedies provided in these Terms of Service are cumulative and not exclusive, and the assertion by a party of any right or remedy will not preclude the assertion by the party of any other rights or the seeking of any other remedies available at law, in equity, by statute, in any other agreement between the parties, or otherwise.

### 17.6 Successors and Assigns

These Terms of Service inure to the benefit of, and are binding on, the parties and their respective successors and assigns. This section does not address, directly or indirectly, whether a party may assign its rights or delegate its performance under these Terms of Service.

### 17.7 Force Majeure

We are not responsible for any failure to perform because of unforeseen circumstances or causes beyond our reasonable control, including: Acts of God, such as fire, flood, earthquakes, hurricanes, tropical storms, or other natural disasters; epidemics; pandemics; war, riot, arson, embargoes, acts of civil or military authority, or terrorism; fiber cuts; strikes, or shortages in transportation, facilities, fuel, energy, labor, or materials; failure of the telecommunications or information services infrastructure; hacking, spam, data breach, malware, or any failure of a computer, server, network, or software for so long as the event continues to delay our performance; and unlawful acts of our employees, agents, or contractors.

### 17.8 Notices

Any notice required to be given by us under these Terms of Service may be provided by email to a functioning email address of the party to be noticed, by a general posting on Bloxflip, or by personal delivery via commercial carrier. Notices by customers to us shall be given by contacting us at support[at]bloxflip[dot]com unless otherwise specified in these Terms of Service. Either party may change the address to which notice is to be sent by written notice to the other party pursuant to this provision of these Terms of Service. Notices shall be deemed effective upon delivery. Notices delivered by overnight carrier shall be deemed delivered on the business day following mailing. Notices delivered by any other method shall be deemed given upon receipt. Either party may, by giving the other party appropriate written notice, change the designated address, email address, or recipient for any notice hereunder. Any correctly addressed notice that is refused, unclaimed, or undeliverable, because of an act or omission of the party to be notified shall be deemed effective as of the first date that said notice was refused or deemed undeliverable by the postal authorities, messenger, email server, or overnight delivery service.

### 17.9 Communications are Not Private

We do not provide any facility for sending or receiving private or confidential electronic communications. All messages transmitted to us shall be deemed to be readily accessible to the general public. Notice is hereby given that all messages entered into Bloxflip may be read by the agents and operators of Bloxflip, regardless of whether they are the intended recipients of such messages.

### 17.10 Authorization and Permission to Send Emails to You

You authorize us to email you notices, advertisements, and other communications, including emails, advertisements, and notices, and that such communications may not be suitable for minors. This authorization will continue until you request us to remove you from our email list. You understand and agree that even unsolicited email correspondence from us, or our Affiliates, is not spam as that term is defined under the law.

### 17.11 Consideration

We allow you to access and use Bloxflip, the Services, and the Materials, as limited by your purchase of certain paid features and upgrades, in consideration for your acquiescence to all the provisions in these Terms of Service. You agree that such consideration is both adequate and received upon your viewing or downloading any portion of Bloxflip.

### 17.12 Electronic Signatures

You agree to be bound by any affirmation, assent, or agreement you transmit through Bloxflip. You agree that when in the future you click on an "I agree," "I consent," or other similarly worded button, check box, or entry field with your mouse, keystroke, or other computer device, your agreement or consent will be legally binding and enforceable and the legal equivalent of your handwritten signature.

### 17.13 English Language

We have written these Terms of Service and our associated website policies in the English language. You are representing your understanding and assent to the English language version of these Terms of Service as they are published. We are not liable to you or any third party for any costs or expenses incurred in translating these Terms of Service. In the event that you choose to translate these Terms of Service, you do so at your own risk, as only the English language version is binding.

### 17.14 Export Control

You understand and acknowledge that the software elements of the Materials on Bloxflip may be subject to regulation by governmental agencies which prohibit export or diversion of software and other goods to certain countries and third parties. Diversion of such Materials contrary to U.S. or international law is prohibited. You will not assist or participate in any such diversion or other violation of applicable laws and regulations. You warrant that you will not license or otherwise permit anyone not approved to receive controlled commodities under applicable laws and regulations and that you will abide by such laws and regulations. You agree that none of the Materials are being or will be acquired for, shipped, transferred, or re-exported, directly or indirectly, to proscribed or embargoed countries or their nationals or be used for proscribed activities.

### 17.15 No Agency Relationship

Nothing in these Terms of Service shall be deemed to constitute, create, imply, give effect to, or otherwise recognize a partnership, employment, joint venture, or formal business entity of any kind; and the rights and obligations of the parties shall be limited to those expressly set forth herein.

### 17.16 Usages

In these Terms of Service, unless otherwise stated or the context otherwise requires, the following usages will apply:

(a) References to a statute will refer to the statute and any successor statute, and to all regulations promulgated under or implementing the statute or successor, as in effect at the relevant time.

(b) In computing periods from a specified date to a later specified date, the words "from" and "commencing on" (and the like) mean "from and including," and the words "to," "until," and "ending on" (and the like) mean "to but excluding."

(c) References to a governmental or quasi-governmental agency, authority, or instrumentality will also refer to a regulatory body that succeeds to the functions of the agency, authority, or instrumentality.

(d) "A or B" means "A or B or both." "A, B, or C" means "one or more of A, B, and C." The same construction applies to longer strings.

(e) "Including" means "including, but not limited to."

### 17.17 No Waiver

No waiver or action made by us shall be deemed a waiver of any subsequent default of the same provision of these Terms of Service. If any term, clause or provision hereof is held invalid or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, such invalidity shall not affect the validity or operation of any other term, clause or provision and such invalid term, clause or provision shall be deemed to be severed from these Terms of Service.

### 17.18 Headings

All headings are solely for the convenience of reference and shall not affect the meaning, construction or effect of these Terms of Service.

### 17.19 Other Jurisdictions/Foreign Law

We make no representation that Bloxflip, the Services, or any of the Materials are appropriate or available for use in other locations, and access to them from territories where their Content may be illegal or is otherwise prohibited. Those who choose to access Bloxflip and use the Services from such locations do so on their own initiative and are solely responsible for determining compliance with all applicable local laws. Nothing contained in these Terms of Service shall be interpreted as an admission that Bloxflip is subject to the laws of any nation besides the United States.

### 17.20 Service Not Available in Some Areas

You are subject to the laws of the state, province, city, country, or other legal entity in which you reside or from which you access Bloxflip. BLOXFLIP IS VOID WHERE PROHIBITED OR RESTRICTED BY LAW. If you open an account or use Bloxflip while located in a prohibited jurisdiction, you will be in violation of the law of such jurisdiction and these Terms of Service, and subject to having your account suspended or terminated without any notice to you. You hereby agree that Bloxflip cannot be held liable if laws applicable to you restrict or prohibit your participation. Bloxflip makes no representations or warranties, implicit or explicit, as to your legal right to participate in any Service offered on Bloxflip, nor shall any person affiliated, or claiming affiliation, with Bloxflip have authority to make any such representations or warranties. We reserve the right to restrict access to Bloxflip in any jurisdiction.

## 18. ROBLOX TRADEMARK DISCLAIMER

Bloxflip is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Roblox Corporation or any of its subsidiaries or affiliates. "Roblox," "Robux," "Limiteds," and any related names, marks, logos, and images are trademarks or registered trademarks of Roblox Corporation and are used herein solely for identification purposes.
